text:

Author: hselasky

Log:
  MFC r358609:
  Restart the USB keyboard repeat timer at every valid key-press.

  This fixes a regression issue after r357861.

  Reported by:	James Wright <james.wright@jigsawdezign.com>
  PR:	224592
  PR:	233884
  Sponsored by:	Mellanox Technologies
